prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: The Vineyard Lies Beneath Us
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Lifetime Original
Tagline: Inspired by something, probably.
Theme: A town never forgets. It just redecorates.
Omen: a lake bell ringing without wind
Relationship dynamic: suspiciously healthy handyman friendship
Props: boat key, blood-adjacent tea towel, unopened letter

Cast:
- Claire Sutton | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=lawyer | threat_aura=0.38 | space=annex room described as retreat supplies | secrets=has an unsent email that would destroy a family
- Noah Vale | archetype=soft_spoken_menace | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=artisan developer | threat_aura=0.82 | space=toolshed described as seasonal materials | secrets=knows exactly how long the sheriff takes to respond; has a second phone labeled as a work precaution
- Wyatt Vale | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=bartender who knows everybody's business | threat_aura=0.63 | space=old family office described as paperwork I have not gone through yet | secrets=once hid a casserole dish containing evidence
- Noah Marlowe | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=realtor | threat_aura=0.6 | space=toolshed described as just storage | secrets=inherited documents she should have burned; knows why the old orchard chapel was closed
- Gavin Bennett | archetype=decorative_husband | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=regional dentist | threat_aura=0.3 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=moved money during a family emergency; was in the wrong county on the wrong night
- Gavin Winterson | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=substitute teacher | threat_aura=0.57 | space=unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files | secrets=accused an innocent scamp and feels sick about it; saw the wrong person near the lake once and never shut up about it
- Luke Sutton | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Cole Pike | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Noah Vale is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Claire Sutton says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Marigold Falls.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Noah?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Luke. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Claire. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The boat key is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Noah."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
